milestones.title: M001: Migration
milestones.vision: A multi-lingual, responsive Progressive Web App (PWA) for personal and student year planning.

milestones.title: M002: JS Modularisation
milestones.vision: Decompose the monolithic Vue controller, model, and API service into focused, single-responsibility ES6 modules. The app behaves identically afterward — all 14 E2E tests pass, no user-visible changes. The codebase is clean and ready for M003 (storage) and M004 (auth) to work against well-defined module boundaries.
success_criteria: controller.js replaced by 5 domain-grouped method modules
model.js restructured from flat bag into grouped sub-objects
Api.js replaced by SyncApi, AuthApi, ProfileApi modules
superagent replaced with native fetch
SquareUp.js and all payment code removed
lodash replaced with native Array methods
Feature flags in a proper ES6 module without window globals
All HTML template bindings updated and recomposed via m4
All new modules wired through CDI
All 14 Playwright E2E tests pass unchanged
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
## Boundary Map

### S01 → S02

Produces:
- `js/vue/methods/calendar.js` → `calendarMethods` object (setYear, navigateToYear)
- `js/vue/methods/entries.js` → `entryMethods` object (updateEntry, getEntry, getEntryType, getEntryColour, getEntryTypeIcon, updateWeekColour, updateEntryState)
- `js/vue/methods/planner.js` → `plannerMethods` object (createPlanner, createLocalPlanner, deletePlannerByYear, showRenamePlanner, renamePlanner, getPlannerName, getPlannerNameByUidYear, getPlannerYears, sharePlanner, copyUrl)
- `js/vue/methods/auth.js` → `authMethods` object (register, signin, signout, showSignin, showRegister, showResetPassword, showRecoverUser, showProfile, peekPass, unpeekPass, peekNewPass, unpeekNewPass, clearModalAlert)
- `js/vue/methods/lifecycle.js` → `lifecycleMethods` object (refresh, initialise, setLocalFromModel, clearError)
- `js/vue/app.js` → updated to import and merge all method modules

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S01 → S03

Produces:
- Same method modules as above — S03 depends on controller being split so Api.js split doesn't conflict

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S02 → S05

Produces:
- `js/vue/model/auth.js` → auth-related state (uuid, username, password, etc.)
- `js/vue/model/planner.js` → planner-related state (planner, month, day, entry, etc.)
- `js/vue/model/calendar.js` → calendar-related state (year, firstWeekdayOfMonth, daysInMonth, etc.)
- `js/vue/model/ui.js` → UI transient state (error, warning, modalError, loaded, etc.)
- `js/vue/model.js` → updated to compose sub-objects into flat model for Vue data()
- Updated .compose HTML fragments with new binding paths
- Recomposed index.html

Consumes from S01:
- Split method modules (must be updated to use new model field paths)

### S03 → S04

Produces:
- `js/service/SyncApi.js` → synchroniseToRemote(), synchroniseToLocal() using fetch
- `js/service/AuthApi.js` → register(), signin(), deleteRegistration() using fetch
- `js/service/ProfileApi.js` → setUsername(), setPassword(), setEmail(), setMobile(), sendVerificationEmail(), verifyEmailToken(), sendRecoverPasswordEmail(), sendRecoverUsernameEmail(), email() using fetch
- `js/service/api-utils.js` → shared error handler, fetch wrapper
- superagent CDN script tag removed from index.html

Consumes from S01:
- Split method modules (controller no longer calls monolithic `this.api.xxx`)

### S04 → S05

Produces:
- SquareUp.js deleted, payment modal HTML removed
- `js/vue/model-features.js` → rewritten as proper ES6 module without window.ftoggle
- lodash-es CDN import removed from StorageLocal.js and StorageRemote.js
- Native Array methods replacing _.filter, _.find, _.findIndex, _.uniq, _.map, _.remove

Consumes from S01:
- Split method modules (payment methods removed from auth methods module)
Consumes from S03:
- Split API modules (payment API methods removed from ProfileApi)

### S05

Produces:
- `js/config/contexts.js` → updated with all new module registrations
- Verified: all 14 E2E tests pass, app boots cleanly, no console errors

Consumes from S01: split method modules
Consumes from S02: restructured model, updated templates
Consumes from S03: split API modules
Consumes from S04: cleaned up dependencies

milestones.title: M003: Storage Modernisation
milestones.vision: Replace cookie-based persistence with localStorage, remove cookie consent modal, and simplify the first-run experience. No cookies set by the application at any point.
success_criteria: No cookies are set by the application at any point
All planner data persists across page reloads via localStorage
Share URL feature still works (LZString compression intact)
Cookie consent modal is completely removed from HTML and JS
`@alt-javascript/cookies` CDN dependency is removed
All E2E tests pass (updated for localStorage)
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
## Boundary Map

### S01 → S02

Produces:
- StorageLocal.js using `localStorage.setItem/getItem/removeItem` instead of `cookies.setCookie/getCookie/deleteCookie`
- StorageRemote.js using localStorage instead of cookies
- No cookie consent modal in HTML
- `cookiesAccepted()` removed or replaced with localStorage existence check
- `Cookies` class removed from CDI contexts.js

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

milestones.title: M004: Auth & API Contract
milestones.vision: Replace bespoke username/password auth with federated sign-in (Google, Apple, Microsoft), define the sync API contract formally via OpenAPI 3.x, and align the sync client to the spec. All testable without live provider accounts.
success_criteria: No bespoke registration, login, password reset, or email verification code remains
Federated auth service module exists with configurable provider client IDs
Nav shows sign-in/sign-out buttons using federated auth
OpenAPI 3.x spec exists and validates
Sync client makes requests matching the OpenAPI spec format
All E2E tests pass (updated for new auth flow)
App boots and works without any auth configured
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
## Boundary Map

### S01 → S02

Produces:
- Simplified auth.js with only `signout()`, `clearModalAlert()`, and placeholder `showSignin()`
- Api.js with only `synchroniseToRemote()`, `synchroniseToLocal()`, `deleteRegistration()`
- Simplified nav with sign-in/sign-out buttons

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S01 → S03

Produces:
- Clear picture of remaining sync API surface (sync push, sync pull, delete account)
- Auth token format (Bearer token from federated provider)

### S02 → S04

Produces:
- AuthProvider.js with `getToken()` method returning current auth token
- Provider abstraction that S04 uses for Bearer token in sync requests

### S03 → S04

Produces:
- OpenAPI spec defining exact request/response shapes for sync endpoints
- Spec that S04's sync client must match

milestones.title: M005: UI/UX Design Research
milestones.vision: Research and present 2-3 visually distinct design directions for the Year Planner, each showing fresher colour palettes, more characterful typography, and nav patterns that get out of the way. User selects a direction for implementation.
success_criteria: 3 self-contained HTML mockup pages in `/mockups/`
Each mockup is visually distinct from the others
Each addresses: muddy colours, generic typography, cluttered nav, weekend/today differentiation
Each includes both light and dark mode treatment
Brief design rationale accompanies each option

milestones.title: M006: UI/UX Polish & Finalisation
milestones.vision: Systematically close remaining visual gaps between the design mockups and the live application, ensuring both themes render consistently across all components, modes, and breakpoints.
success_criteria: Both themes (Ink & Paper, Crisp & Clear) visually match the mockups at desktop width for grid, nav, and footer
All interactive elements (modals, dropdowns, tooltips, buttons) follow theme variables in both light and dark modes
The planner is usable and visually clean at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px+) breakpoints
No Bootstrap default colours or fonts leak through un-themed in any mode

milestones.title: M007: Boot v3 Uplift
milestones.vision: Replace all @alt-javascript v2 CDN imports with v3.0.3, adopt the cleaner Boot/Context/Singleton API, migrate config to ProfileAwareConfig, wire boot-vue's createCdiApp, and keep all 14 E2E tests green throughout.
success_criteria: App boots in the browser using only @alt-javascript v3.0.3 CDN bundles — no v2 references remain
`js/config/config.js` uses `ProfileAwareConfig` + `BrowserProfileResolver` instead of the v2 URL-key encoding
`js/config/contexts.js` uses `Context`/`Singleton` helpers and no longer manually constructs `LoggerFactory`/`LoggerCategoryCache`
`js/main.js` uses `Boot.boot({config})` + `createCdiApp` from `boot-vue` instead of raw `ApplicationContext` construction
All service classes continue to autowire via the existing `this.qualifier`/`this.logger = null` pattern unchanged
All 14 existing Playwright E2E tests pass
Playwright CDN fixture intercepts cover all six v3 bundle URLs so tests run fully offline
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
## Boundary Map

### S01 → S02

Produces:
- `js/config/config.js` — v3 `ProfileAwareConfig` instance, same `has()`/`get()` interface
- `js/config/contexts.js` — `Context([...Singleton(...)])` array, `loggerFactory`/`loggerCategoryCache` removed (Boot provides them via global root)
- All six service classes untouched — CDI wiring pattern is backward-compatible

Consumes:
- nothing (first slice)

### S02

Produces:
- `js/main.js` — `Boot.boot({config})` + `createCdiApp({contexts, config, rootComponent, onReady})` pattern
- `.tests/fixtures/cdn.js` — intercept routes for all 6 v3 ESM bundles + lodash-es; old v2 routes removed
- `.tests/fixtures/` — local copies of all 6 v3 ESM bundle files

Consumes:
- S01: stable config and contexts exports

milestones.vision: Extend the day data model with a tagline ('1', ≤32 chars), long-form notes ('3'), and a single emoji ('4'). Update cell display to show emoji + tagline prefix with ellipsis. Redesign the entry modal with distinct tagline, notes, and emoji fields. Add an emoji stamp mode to the rail — a tabbed picker flyout that lets users paint emoji onto cells by clicking or dragging, parallel to the colour marker mode.
success_criteria: Day entries: '1'=tagline (≤32 chars), '2'=colour, '3'=notes (free-form), '4'=emoji (single char)
Grid cells display: [emoji] tagline… truncated, falling back to truncated notes if no tagline
Entry modal: tagline input (32-char with live counter), notes textarea, inline emoji display with clear
Emoji stamp mode: rail button shows active emoji (😊 default), tabbed flyout, click/drag paints emoji onto cells
Stamp mode and marker mode are mutually exclusive
All 14 existing E2E tests pass after each slice
Compose build produces byte-identical index.html

key_risks.risk: updateEntry called from both Vue modal and plain-JS marker mode with positional args — changing the signature breaks one path
key_risks.whyItMatters: Marker mode calls vueInstance.updateEntry directly; wrong arity silently drops fields

key_risks.risk: Stamp mode and marker mode both intercept capture-phase mousedown — co-existence needs explicit mutual exclusion
key_risks.whyItMatters: Both active simultaneously would apply colour and emoji on the same click

proof_strategy.retireIn: S02 — all 14 E2E tests pass; marker mode manual spot-check
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Marker mode still paints colour correctly after arity update; modal saves all fields

proof_strategy.retireIn: S03 — verified by toggling both modes in browser
proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: Activating stamp deactivates marker and vice versa; only one active at a time

milestones.verification_contract: All 14 Playwright E2E tests pass after each slice: `cd .tests && npx playwright test`. Compose build: `.compose/build.sh && git diff --exit-code index.html`.
milestones.verification_integration: Modal opens, saves tagline + notes + emoji, cell updates immediately. Stamp mode paints emoji; marker mode paints colour; toggling one deactivates the other.
milestones.verification_uat: User confirms: (1) tagline + notes + emoji save and reload correctly, (2) cell display is readable at all breakpoints, (3) emoji stamp flyout categories and paint behaviour feel right.
milestones.requirement_coverage: New capability. Enriches per-day data contract ahead of sync backend (M009+).
milestones.boundary_map_markdown:
### S01 → S02
Produces:
- `js/vue/model/planner.js` — `entryTagline`, `entryNotes`, `entryEmoji` state fields added
- `js/vue/methods/entries.js` — `getEntryTagline`, `getEntryNotes`, `getEntryEmoji`, `getEntryCellDisplay`; `updateEntry` accepts emoji+notes; `updateEntryState` populates new fields
- `js/service/StorageLocal.js` — `updateLocalEntry` persists `'1'`=tagline, `'3'`=notes, `'4'`=emoji

Consumes: nothing

### S02 → S03
Produces:
- `.compose/fragments/grid.html` — cell uses `getEntryCellDisplay(mindex,n)`
- `.compose/fragments/modals/entry.html` — tagline + notes + inline emoji display with clear button
- Recomposed `index.html`

Consumes:
- S01: stable getter/setter API, updated `updateEntry` signature

### S03
Produces:
- `.compose/fragments/rail.html` — emoji stamp button + tabbed flyout
- `.compose/fragments/scripts.html` — stamp mode JS with mutual exclusion
- `css/` — stamp flyout styles
- Recomposed `index.html`

Consumes:
- S01: `updateEntry` with emoji field
- S02: cell renders emoji so stamp result is immediately visible

slices.title: Test Infrastructure
slices.demo: Add the CDI readiness signal to Application.

slices.title: Core E2e Tests
slices.demo: Download all CDN dependency fixtures and write the shared `cdn.

slices.title: Security Hardening
slices.demo: Wave 0 scaffolding: create the test files, fixture, and helper script that implementation plans depend on for verification.

slices.title: HTML Composition
slices.demo: unit tests prove HTML Composition works
slices.goal: unit tests prove HTML Composition works

slices.title: Controller decomposition
slices.demo: controller.js replaced by 5 domain-grouped method modules (calendar, entries, planner, auth, ui-lifecycle). App boots and all 14 E2E tests pass. Methods still use flat model fields.
slices.goal: Replace the monolithic 314-line `controller.js` with 5 domain-grouped method modules under `js/vue/methods/`. The app boots and all 14 E2E tests pass. Methods still use flat model fields.

slices.title: Model restructuring and template update
slices.demo: model.js split into grouped sub-objects. All .compose HTML fragments updated with new field paths. index.html recomposed via m4. All 14 E2E tests pass with restructured model.
slices.goal: Split the monolithic 43-field `model.js` into 4 domain-grouped source files under `js/vue/model/`, with all 17 dynamic fields (currently ghost fields set only by Application.js) declared with initial values. The flat model for `data()` is preserved via spread merge — no template or method module changes needed.

slices.title: API layer modularisation and fetch migration
slices.demo: Api.js replaced by SyncApi, AuthApi, ProfileApi using native fetch. superagent CDN dependency removed. Sync-error E2E test still passes. All 14 tests pass.
slices.goal: Replace all superagent HTTP calls in Api.js with native fetch via a shared `fetchJSON` helper. Split Api methods into SyncApi, AuthApi, ProfileApi sub-modules imported by the Api facade. Remove superagent CDN dependency. All 14 E2E tests pass, including the sync-error test.

slices.title: Dependency cleanup
slices.demo: SquareUp.js deleted, payment modal removed, lodash replaced with native methods, feature flags in proper ES6 module. All 14 tests pass.
slices.goal: Remove SquareUp.js and all payment code, replace lodash with native Array methods in StorageLocal.js and StorageRemote.js, rewrite model-features.js as proper ES6 module without window.ftoggle global. All 14 E2E tests pass.

slices.title: CDI wiring and integration verification
slices.demo: All new modules registered in contexts.js. Full integration verified — app boots, all 14 Playwright tests pass, no console errors. Milestone complete.
slices.goal: Final integration verification of all M002 changes. Confirm contexts.js is clean, delete orphaned controller.js, verify app boots with no console errors, all 14 E2E tests pass, and .compose/build.sh produces valid output. Close the milestone.

slices.title: Replace cookies with localStorage and remove consent modal
slices.demo: App boots without cookie consent modal, all data persisted in localStorage. Manual browser verification confirms no cookies set.
slices.goal: Replace all cookie operations with localStorage, remove the cookie consent modal, remove @alt-javascript/cookies CDN dependency, simplify the first-run flow. App boots and works without cookies.

slices.title: Update E2E test infrastructure for localStorage
slices.demo: All 14 E2E tests pass with localStorage-based flow. Milestone complete.
slices.goal: Update all E2E test infrastructure to work with localStorage instead of cookies. All 14 tests pass. Milestone complete.

slices.title: Remove bespoke auth code
slices.demo: No register/signin/password-reset/recover-username modals. Nav simplified. Api.js trimmed from 453 to ~180 lines. All 14 E2E tests pass.
slices.goal: Remove all bespoke registration, login, password reset, email verification, and profile editing code. Simplify nav and Api.js. All 14 E2E tests pass.

slices.title: Federated auth service module
slices.demo: AuthProvider.js module with Google/Apple/Microsoft support. Sign-in nav button triggers provider selection. Configurable client IDs. App boots without provider config.
slices.goal: Create AuthProvider.js with a common interface for Google/Apple/Microsoft sign-in. Configurable client IDs. Sign-in button in nav triggers provider selection. App boots without any provider configured.

slices.title: OpenAPI 3.x sync API spec
slices.demo: `api/openapi.yaml` validates. Covers auth token exchange, planner sync push/pull, and account deletion.
slices.goal: Write `api/openapi.yaml` defining the sync API contract. Covers auth token exchange, planner sync (push/pull), and account deletion.

slices.title: Sync client aligned to spec and final integration
slices.demo: Sync methods use Bearer token from federated auth, request/response shapes match OpenAPI spec. All E2E tests pass. Milestone complete.
slices.goal: Update sync methods in Api.js to use Bearer token from AuthProvider, match OpenAPI spec endpoints. Final integration verification. Milestone complete.

slices.title: Create design mockups
slices.demo: 3 mockup HTML files ready for user review. User picks a direction.
slices.goal: 3 self-contained HTML mockup pages showing distinct design directions.

slices.title: Grid & typography polish
slices.demo: grid cells, day column, weekend/today highlighting, and row spacing match the mockup for both themes

slices.title: Dark mode completeness audit
slices.demo: every Bootstrap component (dropdowns, modals, form controls, buttons) is fully themed in dark mode with no default leaks

slices.title: Responsive layout polish
slices.demo: grid, nav, footer, modals, rail, and floating controls render cleanly at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px+)

slices.title: Core framework swap — config, contexts, Boot.boot()
slices.demo: app boots with v3 config/logger/cdi bundles; `ProfileAwareConfig` resolves env-specific API URL; services autowire logger correctly; boot E2E test passes.

slices.title: main.js — wire boot-vue createCdiApp + E2E fixture coverage
slices.demo: all 14 E2E tests pass with offline-intercepted v3 CDN fixtures; zero v2 CDN references remain in the codebase.

slices.title: Data layer — extend day schema
slices.demo: After this: new getters work, all fields persist to localStorage, 14 E2E tests green.
slices.goal: Extend the day schema with `'3'` (notes) and `'4'` (emoji) keys, add corresponding reactive state and getters, expand the write path, and update importLocalPlanner — all additively, with no regressions in the existing 14 E2E tests.
slices.success_criteria:
- `plannerState` has `entryNotes: ''` and `entryEmoji: ''`
- `getEntryNotes(mindex, day)` and `getEntryEmoji(mindex, day)` getters exist and read keys `'3'`/`'4'`
- `updateEntry` accepts optional `notes` and `emoji` params (default `''`); threads them to `updateLocalEntry`
- `updateEntryState` populates `this.entryNotes` and `this.entryEmoji` from planner
- `updateLocalEntry` persists `'3'` and `'4'` alongside existing keys
- `importLocalPlanner` merges `'3'` (notes concat) and `'4'` (emoji last-write-wins)
- `cd .tests && npx playwright test` shows 14 passed, 0 failed
slices.proof_level: contract — all 14 E2E tests pass; new getters verified via test assertions in the E2E suite
slices.integration_closure: All changes are confined to three JS files. The entry modal template (entry.html) is intentionally NOT changed — existing 6-arg call sites continue to work because new params are appended with `''` defaults. S02 will update the template to pass all 8 args when redesigning the modal.
slices.observability_impact: None — purely additive schema extension in storage layer.

slices.title: Cell display + entry modal
slices.demo: After this: entry modal has three distinct fields; cells show emoji + tagline preview.
slices.goal: Update grid cell to show emoji + tagline… (notes fallback). Redesign entry modal: tagline input (32-char + live counter), notes textarea, inline emoji show/clear. Wire all Vue bindings.
slices.success_criteria: Cells show correct prefix display. Modal saves tagline + notes + emoji independently. All 14 E2E tests pass. Compose build clean.
slices.proof_level: integration — open modal, fill all fields, save, confirm cell and localStorage update
slices.integration_closure: entry.html and grid.html are the only display surfaces. Both use S01 getters.

slices.title: Emoji stamp rail mode
slices.demo: After this: full emoji stamp mode works end-to-end — pick, paint, persist.
slices.goal: Add emoji stamp button to rail (shows active emoji, 😊 default). Tabbed flyout with categorised emoji grids: Celebrations, School, Travel/Nature, Moon/Weather, Misc. Click/drag stamps selected emoji onto cells. Eraser clears emoji. Mutual exclusion with marker mode.
slices.success_criteria: Stamp mode activates/deactivates cleanly. Click and drag paint emoji. Activating stamp deactivates marker and vice versa. Flyout tabs work. Active emoji shown on button. All 14 E2E tests pass. Compose build clean.
slices.proof_level: integration — activate stamp, pick emoji, paint cells, toggle to marker mode, confirm mutual exclusion
slices.integration_closure: Stamp JS bridges to Vue via vueInstance.updateEntry, same path as marker mode. Rail HTML + scripts.html only.

# T01: Extended day schema with keys '3' (notes) and '4' (emoji) across model, getters, write path, and import; all 14 E2E tests pass

**Extended day schema with keys '3' (notes) and '4' (emoji) across model, getters, write path, and import; all 14 E2E tests pass**

## What Happened

Three files updated additively. plannerState gained entryNotes/entryEmoji reactive fields. entryMethods gained getEntryNotes/getEntryEmoji getters and updateEntryState now populates both; updateEntry signature extended with optional notes/emoji params before syncToRemote. StorageLocal.updateLocalEntry now writes keys '3' and '4' (initial object literal updated too); importLocalPlanner handles key '3' with concat-newline merge and key '4' with last-write-wins. All existing callers remain valid — new params default to empty string.

## Verification

Ran `cd .tests && npx playwright test` — 14 tests, 14 passed, 0 failed, 6.3s.

## Verification Evidence

| # | Command | Exit Code | Verdict | Duration |
|---|---------|-----------|---------|----------|
| 1 | `cd .tests && npx playwright test 2>&1 | tail -20` | 0 | ✅ pass | 6300ms |


## Deviations

None.

## Known Issues

None.

## Files Created/Modified

- `js/vue/model/planner.js`
- `js/vue/methods/entries.js`
- `js/service/StorageLocal.js`
tasks.description:
Implement all four additive changes to extend the day schema with keys '3' (notes) and '4' (emoji).

**Build order:**
1. `js/vue/model/planner.js` — add `entryNotes: ''` and `entryEmoji: ''` to `plannerState`
2. `js/vue/methods/entries.js` — add `getEntryNotes`/`getEntryEmoji` getters; expand `updateEntryState` to set `this.entryNotes`/`this.entryEmoji`; expand `updateEntry` signature with optional `notes = ''` and `emoji = ''` params (keep `syncToRemote` last); thread both to `storageLocal.updateLocalEntry`
